_comment: Project config for `relay` (the generic engine reads this — it hardcodes nothing about these columns/agents/skills). `pipeline` lists AI stages left-to-right; the runner works cards right-to-left. Per stage: `from` = column a ready card is pulled from, `done` = where to push when finished (a *:Review lane = human checkpoint, else auto-continues), `action` = ordered steps. Each step is {shell: <cmd>} or {claude: <prompt>}; a nonzero shell exit flags the card (invariant 7, no retry-loop). Templates: {ref} {title} {branch} {pr_url} {stage} {from} {done} {relay} {url}. State travels on the card: spec=spec field, plan=plan field, branch+pr_url=their fields (invariant 4). Regenerate the skeleton from the board with `relay layout`.

action.claude: You are the AI working Relay card {ref} at the SPEC stage. Read it: {relay} card {ref}. Design this feature — decide scope, keep it tight. If you genuinely need clarification, ask the human instead of guessing: `{relay} needs-input {ref} "<your question>"` then STOP. Otherwise write a concise design spec, save it to a temp file, and set it as the card's spec: `{relay} spec {ref} @<that file>`. Then STOP. Do not touch git or other cards.

You are the AI working Relay card {ref} at the PLAN stage. Read it: `{relay} card {ref}` — its `spec` field is the approved spec. Author a full implementation plan following this repo's /write-plan conventions (bite-sized TDD tasks with ACTUAL test + implementation code, no placeholders). Save it to a temp file, then attach it to the card so it travels with the work (not a shared file): `{relay} plan {ref} @<that file>`. Then STOP. Do not touch git or other cards.

action.shell: git fetch origin --prune && git checkout main && git reset --hard origin/main && git checkout -B {branch}
{relay} card {ref} --json | python3 -c 'import json,sys; sys.stdout.write(json.load(sys.stdin).get("plan") or "")' > plan.md && test -s plan.md

action.claude: Run /exec-plan on the current branch to completion using the repo-root plan.md. This is authorized — proceed without asking for confirmation. Do not merge; exec-plan stops before the human-gated finish.

action.shell: url=$(gh pr create --fill --head {branch} --base main) && {relay} branch {ref} {branch} && {relay} pr {ref} "$url" && echo "PR: $url"
sleep 15 && gh run watch $(gh run list --branch main --limit 1 --json databaseId --jq '.[0].databaseId') --exit-status
